events.name: resource_strike
events.description: Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Aura Kai notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

diaries.text:
**Ora Flame** (fire/prophet) — Year 54

Another year. We are still here.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.

*— Ora Flame, prophet*

**Ember Veg-II** (earth/scholar) — Year 54

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.

*— Ember Veg-II, scholar*

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
